Image file: Screenshot 2026-04-21 105512.png

 The image is a screenshot of a computer screen displaying a message in French, which translates to "Hello." The message is from a sender named Madame Sandra and it appears that she's seeking help or information related to the content below the greeting. She mentions that she has been notified of something on behalf of Mr. Xavier Kessler, who is associated with the Comoros Islands and Mrs. D.F., both being citizens of Madagascar.

The message includes a request for information about an institution called "BENJAMIN," which seems to be located in Madagascar. The sender's signature is at the bottom, though the details are obscured in the image.

Please note that due to the nature of a screenshot, this analysis is limited to describing the content of the image, and it does not include any speculative or imaginary elements.
